title: Cocktail table - 36'' square w/30'' and 42'' poles
features: Square cocktail tables are all the rage!
Our 36'' cocktail table kit with a square top includes the tabletop, coupler, 28'' aluminum base, and both poles to make a dining height and ''belly bar'' height table with the same kit.
These tables will do double duty in your rental inventory or at your event venue.

specifications.Free Shipping Deal Type: Free Shipping on Tables and Chairs Over $5k, Free Shipping on 10 or more
